query: AutoZone job posting (artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI OR LLM OR data scientist)

results.title: AutoZone AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
AutoZone, Inc., the leading automotive replacement parts retailer in the Americas, has positioned itself as a technology-forward company leveraging artificial intelligence to optimize operations across its supply chain and customer experience. The company has partnered with RELEX Solutions for AI-driven forecasting and replenishment across its distribution centers since 2019, expanding this partnership to Brazil in 2023 to streamline global supply chain operations[1][2]. AutoZone employs machine learning algorithms to forecast demand, optimize inventory levels, and predict which products will be needed, while also integrating AI into supply chain management to adjust distribution strategies and ensure faster store replenishment[3]. The company has also deployed AI-powered construction cameras with artificial intelligence for activity analysis across its global construction projects, enabling better project monitoring and cost control[4]. While AutoZone's current AI implementations focus primarily on operational efficiency and supply chain optimization, the company appears to be taking a measured approach to AI adoption compared to some retail peers.
...

Legal department shows highest AI mention rate, possibly reflecting compliance and risk management needs.

How AutoZone and NAPA Auto Parts Use Machine Learning to Forecast Demand
...
How does AutoZone use AI in its operations?
...
AutoZone uses AI primarily for supply chain optimization through demand forecasting and inventory replenishment via its partnership with RELEX Solutions, as well as for construction project monitoring using AI-powered cameras.
...
AutoZone began implementing AI-driven forecasting and replenishment solutions with RELEX in 2019, initially for U.S. and Mexico operations, expanding to Brazil in 2023.
...
What AI technologies does AutoZone use for inventory management?
...
AutoZone uses machine learning algorithms and predictive analytics through its RELEX partnership to analyze historical sales data, seasonal trends, and external factors for demand prediction and inventory optimization.

results.title: Yu-Han Lin
highlights:
2023
...
Science | Actively Seeking Opportunities in Machine Learning and AI
...
Data Scientist at [AutoZone](https://www.linkedin.com/company/autozone)
...
Driven Data Scientist and Deep Learning Researcher specializing in utilizing advanced computational algorithms and statistical methods to solve complex problems. Graduated with a Master of Science in Data Science from Johns Hopkins University and a Bachelor of Science in Mathematical Science from National Chengchi University. Skilled in an array of languages and platforms including Python, R, C, C++, C#, Tensorflow, Tensorflow Lite, Keras, Pytorch, pandas, scikit-learn, OpenCV, numpy, matplotlib, Git, Bash, Visual Studio, and Jupyter Notebook, to name a few. In my experience as an intern with Funcode Technology and Shanghai Far Eastern IT Company, I developed and enhanced OCR models, trained deep learning models for anomaly detection, and executed object detection tasks with Tensorflow and YOLO. I have a proven track record in the application of machine learning techniques such as predictive modeling, clustering, time series analysis, experiment design, regression, k-means, factor analysis, time series, markov chains, and CNN, among others. My academic training culminated in projects such as real-time semantic segmentation implementation, semi-supervised learning on the iNaturalist dataset, cross-race effect in ML, medical research paper sentence extraction and classification, Covid-19 frontal chest X-ray detection, lottery automatic text detection on edge devices, and Edge AI Tflite post and pre quantization and pruning comparison. I am also well-versed in game design, having created a 3D RPG game called "Spell Casting IRL" during the University Innovation Game Design Competition. I'm committed to deploying my deep learning expertise to create transformative solutions in the field of data science. Always open for collaboration, feel free to reach out to discuss opportunities in AI and data science.
...

Brief Description of the Project - My project is divided into 2 parts: (a) Using Count Vectorizer as the vectorization technique and implementing all the stated Machine Learning algorithms without any hyperparameter tuning, meaning, keeping it as simple as possible. (b) Using TF-IDF Vectorization as the vectorization technique and implementing the Machine Learning algorithms along with hyper parameter tuning, along with the additional Ensemble Technique, thus making it more complex. The results for both implementations are later displayed at the end. The following sections will delve deeper into the solution, results, and insights gained from the project. Show less
...
In this project, I have trained the ‘Kung-Fu Master’ agent twice using vanilla Deep Q-Network (DQN) algorithm – once using the Multi-layer Perceptron layers (MLP) and then using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). I have then analyzed the performance of both these variants and concluded that CNN works better.

For data analysts interested in mastering promotional and testing analytics and direct marketing effectiveness, we have a role currently open for you! https://lnkd.in/eJACAgax
...
Two years at Cognida.ai . Went by fast. I caught the notification on our internal site this morning and wanted to put my thoughts out.
...
1. Knowing the 'why' changes everything - At Cognida, the primary motive is driving outcomes for clients. What made this click for me was understanding what those outcomes mean for each client and not just delivering technology but knowing the problem deeply enough to make a real difference. Everyone wants an AI solution, very few want to do the work that makes it run. Clean data, solid processes, asking if a process should even exist before automating it. Then build AI that actually delivers. If the foundation is broken, AI just accelerates the mess. 

2. Trust changes how fast you move - I have made calls I would have needed three meetings to approve elsewhere. That kind of trust changes how you think and how fast you move. Rarer than it sounds, and I do not take it for granted. Thanks to the founding group for building this culture.
...
3. Stay curious and learn - GTM and market solutions are my core but over the past year I have been exploring on the builder side. Completed the Forward Deployment Engineering track on Caddy, hands-on with agentic AI implementations. Not because it is trendy, but because you must understand how things work to have the right conversations. And equally doubling down on architecture, leadership, business alignment, complex integrations. That is where I want to keep getting better. 

There is real depth here - engineering, solutions, domain knowledge. My job is to make sure that depth reaches the client and solves the right problem.
...
Still a lot to build. Good place to be doing it. #AIConsulting #GTM #AgenticAI #TwoYears #CognidaAI #Leadership #StayCurious #AIStrategy #DigitalTransformation

highlights:

#### Vice President Information Technology (Current)
...
Technology Leader, Leader of Technology. Since moving from an Architect Role, my teams have: 1) Migrated our complex store systems into our Brazil stores. That time I had to write some assembly in a hotel room to get it off the ground is only getting mentioned because yeah, that happened, and somebody out there wants really bad to be around management that can do that. 2) Standardized our credit/debit infrastructure in MX to align with the US 3) Migrated our MX stores onto Oracle Cloud HCM 4) Replaced our US POS completely with an in-house, modern technology stack work of art 5) Released our newest iteration of the industry leading FixFinder vehicle diagnostics platform 6) Put the ToTVS ERP into action in Brazil. 7) About 900 things I won't share publicly but are super important and cool. I'm not for hire. But if you want to be where the action is, whatever your skillset, I think we have it covered. Even financial advice. Our stock has a documented 20 year annual growth rate of something like 18.9%. Perhaps, we need a whiteboard but I'm pretty sure wherever you are reading this, they're not matching that number. ...
I am not camera friendly so a call out to the video production team for this. One powerful event I have witnessed, seeing my software in action was at a store in Sao
...
adjoining a grocery store in a relatively poor area. A young family with two children 2-4 years of age came out of the grocery store and when they started their car, the belt snapped. Since the parking lot adjoined ours, the husband came in and our AutoZoners went over to the grocery side of the lot, helped identify the problem. After looking up the correct belt part using software I helped create, they installed the new belt to get them going. I can't speak Portuguese, but it wasn't hard to see the distress at fresh groceries and a broken car with kids in the back seat. If you see this sort of thing while standing there in real life enough times, it has a deep impression on why you do what you do, and while I am proud of my contribution. I have nothing but admiration for the people standing in our stores who make these stories possible every day. Proud to support all of you. Learn why John chose AutoZone 17 years ago! results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
...

...
